﻿# GitHub 热点抓取任务

## 背景
这是工程部生命周期系统的真实任务测试。要求 engineering-leader 自己完成信息抓取、整理和汇报，不再拆给 builder。目标是验证 leader 在允许亲自做信息整理任务时，能按 task-hall/task-link 完成闭环。

## 目标
抓取并整理当前 GitHub 热点项目，输出可读 Markdown 报告。

## 工作范围
- 获取 GitHub Trending 或等价公开来源的当前热门仓库信息。
- 至少整理 10 个项目。
- 每个项目包含：仓库名、链接、主要语言/技术、简介、热度指标（如 stars today / total stars，如可获得）、为什么值得关注。
- 输出 Markdown 报告到 `D:\agent_workspace\tmp\github-hot-repos\github-hot-repos.md`。
- 可使用网页/命令/公开 API；不使用 token，不登录，不调用需要密钥的服务。

## 不做范围
- 不克隆大型仓库。
- 不写爬虫长期服务。
- 不 push、不部署、不发送外部消息。
- 不使用 GitHub token 或任何密钥。

Published: 2026-03-15T14:32:51.000Z
Author: Autonoly Team
Highlights:
GitHub's trending page (`github.com/trending`) is the pulse of the open source ecosystem. Every day, it surfaces the repositories gaining the most stars, forks, and community attention. For developers, engineering leaders, investors, and developer tool companies, this data is a window into what the global developer community is building, adopting, and excited about.
[...]
presents a curated list of repositories organized by time period (daily
[...]
monthly) and optionally filtered by programming language. Each listing contains several data points worth extracting.
[...]
- Total star count — The cumulative number of stars the repository has received since creation. High star counts indicate established projects; low star counts on trending repos indicate breakout newcomers.
[...]
- Stars gained in the period — The number of new stars gained during the trending period (today, this week, or this month). This is the most valuable metric because it measures current momentum rather than historical accumulation.
[...]
"Go to github.com/trending and scrape all trending repositories for today. For each repo, extract the repository name (owner/repo format), description, primary programming language, total star count, stars gained today, and fork count. Collect all repos on the page."
[...]
Stars gained per day varies enormously across trending
[...]
. Understanding the distribution
[...]
and identify outliers. A repo gaining 500 stars per day is exceptionally hot — it might be the
[...]
Tailwind CSS or Langchain. A repo gaining 50 stars per day is solidly popular but
[...]
GitHub's trending page updates throughout the day as repos gain stars. The "today" trending list at midnight reflects the full day's activity, while mid-day scrapes capture a partial picture. Schedule your daily scrape for late evening US Pacific Time (GitHub's servers are in the US) to capture the most complete daily snapshot.

+# GitHub 今日热点项目整理
+

+

+| 10 | [home-assistant/core](https://github.com/home-assistant/core) | Python / Smart home | Home Assistant 的核心开源智能家居自动化平台。 | 约 86,604 stars / 37,365 forks / 73 stars today | 智能家居开源生态代表项目，fork 数非常高，反映插件、集成和社区贡献活跃度。 |
+| 11 | [codecrafters-io/build-your-own-x](https://github.com/codecrafters-io/build-your-own-x) | Markdown / Learning resources | 收集“从零构建 X”的学习资源，例如构建数据库、操作系统、编译器等。 | 约 496,928 stars / 47,094 forks / 1,075 stars today | 近 50 万 stars 的学习资源仍有超过千级当日增长，说明系统化底层工程学习长期有强需求。 |
+| 12 | [openclaw/openclaw](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw) | TypeScript / AI agent tooling | AI agent / coding assistant 相关开源项目。 | 约 364,777 stars / 74,705 forks / 627 stars today | AI agent 工具链热度高且总 stars、forks 指标异常突出，值得关注其社区扩散、实际可用性和生态插件。 |
+| 13 | [ComposioHQ/awesome-codex-skills](https://github.com/ComposioHQ/awesome-codex-skills) | Python / Codex skills | Codex/AI coding skills 资源集合。 | 约 2,118 stars / 163 forks / 517 stars today | AI coding skills 正快速形成独立知识组织形态；该仓库当日增长高，适合关注技能标准化与 agent 能力复用。 |
+
+## 观察总结
+
+1. AI coding / agent / skills 相关项目占比很高，例如 `mattpocock/skills`、`free-claude-code`、`openclaw/openclaw`、`awesome-codex-skills`，说明开发者正集中探索“可复用能力包”和 agent 工作流。
+2. 经典基础设施项目（`curl/curl`、`home-assistant/core`、`build-your-own-x`）仍能进入热点，说明 GitHub Trending 不只反映新项目，也会被社区传播、学习和版本事件带动。
+3. 热度指标需要谨慎解读：Trending 的 `stars today` 是当前周期增长快照，页面会滚动变化；报告中的数值适合作为趋势参考，不应视为长期排名。
+
+## 数据来源与限制
+
+- 来源页面：GitHub Trending daily 页面 `https://github.com/trending?since=daily`。
+- 抓取方式：公开网页内容抓取与搜索结果交叉核对；未使用 GitHub API token，未登录。
+- 限制：GitHub Trending 页面随时间更新，同一日不同时间抓取的 stars today 和排序可能不同；部分仓库简介基于仓库名称、Trending 摘要及项目公开定位整理，未克隆仓库或深度审计代码。
*** End Patch
